title: Wu Feng
content:
Wu Feng
 is one of the 
Celestial

Grand Empyreans
 and one of the 
Immortal Astral Continent
's 
Nine Suns
. He is said to be extremely picky with allowing cultivators to follow him, rarely recruiting anyone below 
Ascendant Empyrean
.

It has been said that he became a 
Grand Empyrean
 through the dao of martial arts.

History
[
]

He travels to the Mountain Sea Continent with 
Dao Yi
 and 
Jiu Di
 and witnessed 
Wang Lin
's faith spell Sundered Night. Like 
Dao Yi
, he was interested in recruiting 
Wang Lin
, but was wary of his origin and wanted to confirm he was not the cultivator 
Xuan Luo
 had come to retrieve many years ago.

When 
Wang Lin
 passed the 10th palace of the 
Empyrean Exalt Trial
, he personally came to recruit 
Wang Lin
 with his real body to show his sincerity.

When Wang Lin passed the 13th palace and was exposed by 
Lian Daozhen
 for using his soul armor, he backed up Wang Lin. He went against 
Lian Daozhen
 in order to gain the favor of Wang Lin, knowing that even if he failed in recruiting him he would at least be able to forge a good relationship with 
Wang Lin
.

He later works together with Gemini, Jiu Di, and Dao Yi to stop Lian Daozhen from receiving the 
Celestial Ancestor
's inheritance. When Wang Lin takes the Celestial Emperor's soul, he receives the Celestial Ancestor's ears from him.
